## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Example: "Patients often miss their turn because they can't see live queue updates."

## Describe the solution you'd like

What should happen?

## Describe alternatives you've considered

Any alternative approaches or workarounds.

## Who is affected?

- [ ] Patients
- [ ] Staff
- [ ] Admin
- [ ] Other: \***\*\_\_\_\_\*\***

## Additional context

Add mockups, references, or anything else useful.
